title: MUHUOTU 木火土｜廣告主視覺 Key Visual 16:9
summary: 全版品牌主視覺，深橄欖綠背景，金色大標語、四個功能圖示、貓狗入鏡，底部四欄品牌承諾，手寫 CTA。
prompt: Full-spread brand key visual for MUHUOTU pet-friendly fragrance spray. Deep olive-sage green background (#3D5245) with soft organic plant leaf shadows. Left: large gold headline "為毛孩而生的安心生活香氛", sub-headline "有毛孩，也可以很好聞". Four benefit icon badges in gold line-art: leaf, paw, sparkle, shield. Center: matte white bottle on stone pedestal. Right: smiling caramel poodle + green-eyed tabby cat, round badge "PET-FRIENDLY · NATURAL CARE". Bottom bar: cream tone, 4 icon columns (天然植萃/寵物友善/安心配方/人寵共用). Bottom right: handwritten "每天噴一噴，空氣清新，毛孩安心。♡" Professional advertising campaign, 16:9 landscape, premium natural brand, 8K.
